title: abeec 6 Pack Of Toilet Putty With 3 Slime - Party Bag Fillers - Putty For Kids - Farting Toys For Kids - Slime Putty - Prank Stuff - Slime Party Bag Fillers
features: Party Bag Filler - The Perfect Option For Kids' Party Favours, This Fart Putty Will Bring Endless Hours Of Joy. Prank Your Friends By Squishing The Putty Into The Plastic Toilet To Make A Fart Noise

Stretchy Toys - Kids Bulk Party Bag Fillers - This Pack Contains 6 X Individual Toilet Putty In 3 Different Colours And Is Perfect For Party Bag Fillers, Lucky Dip Prizes, Birthday Gifts And More

Slime Party Bag Fillers - This Joke Putty Is Reusable. To Avoid The Slime Drying Out When Not Use, Be Sure To Place It Back In To The Toilet Tubs With The Lid Closed. This Helps Keep The Sensory Putty Squishy
Ready Made Slime - This Toilet Putty Is For Ages 3 And Over And Is Not For Consumption. This Noisy Non-toxic Slime Is An Ideal Party Favour And A Kids Favourite Party Bag Filler.
